narrative:
Allen Township has 1,947 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.2 percentage points.
